productDisplayName: Playboy Men Ibiza Perfume & Deodorant Set
description: Style Noteplayboy knows a lot about the good life and this aromatic fragrance for men takes us to the island of Ibiza, where the days are lazy and the nights are alive with dancing and sensuality. This fresh and sensual fragrance is made with the finest ingredients for a long lasting scent, sure to tempt the girls, whenever and wherever you party. Product DetailsPerfume and deodorant set with a very well-balanced scent, luminous, fresh, green and spicy CautionDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying in eyes SizePerfume: 100 mlDeodorant: 150 ml
